component.name: TenshiSTEP
component.summary: NeXTSTEP/OPENSTEP-inspired Global Theme for KDE Plasma

description.p: TenshiSTEP (brand: TenshiNET) is a complete NeXTSTEP / OPENSTEP-inspired theme suite for the whole boot-to-desktop chain, in coordinated light and dark variants: Global Theme, colour scheme, Aurorae window decoration, Plasma style, Kvantum widget style, a GTK3/4 theme, an encyclopedic icon theme, SGI IRIX-idiom cursors, wallpapers, SDDM and Plymouth.

Live-KDE fixes: the Global Theme no longer forces an unavailable widget style (safe Breeze default, installer auto-upgrades to Kvantum or the compiled TenshiSTEP style when present), and Aurorae titlebar buttons render again (state elements renamed to the names Aurorae expects). A transparent-frame gap is diagnosed and pending live rework.
Brought the dark icon theme to full parity with the expanded light set, added the MIT LICENSE and the dark Global Theme preview, and fixed a stale darkmode README note.

Wired the IRIX cursors and Kvantum widget style into the Global Theme; added a GTK3/4 theme, monochrome panel symbolic icons, more Plasma style widgets and Aurorae buttons, a selectable wallpaper package, and a large application/action/device/emblem icon expansion.
